items.description: Array of { id, title, content, icon?, disabled? }.

mode.description: Whether multiple panels can be open at once.

chevronPosition.description: Where the expand chevron appears in the header.

onChange.description: Called when the set of open items changes.

ariaLabel.description: Accessible name for the accordion if needed.

headingLevel.description: Heading level used for each item title (h1-h6) so the page heading outline is correct.

unmountOnCollapse.description: Unmount panel content when collapsed (useful for heavy content that should not stay in the DOM).

className.description: Additional CSS class for the accordion wrapper.
